'''"Snakes' Den"''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Camden]].

{{Stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
"Snakes' Den" first appeared in [[1994]]'s ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' in a section authored by [[Sean Patrick Fannon]].<ref name="CRO">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref> Fannon's unlicensed [[1995]] article 
"[[The Spark Before the Flame]]" later featured "Snake's Den".<ref name="S18.5">{{ShadisCite|18.5|The Spark Before the Flame}} {{Un}}</ref>
